daily.today_energy: Your emotional radar is finely tuned rn. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically cosmic text messages. Channel this sensitivity into creative outlets and you'll vibe into something real.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, quality time hits different today. Single? Someone's noticing your soft energy. Don't overthink it—just be authentically you and see what blooms naturally.
daily.career: Your ideas have legs today. Speak up in meetings or pitches—your perspective brings something others are missing. This isn't about hustle; it's about showing up as your whole self.
daily.health: Your body's asking for nourishment and rest, not punishment. Move in ways that feel good, eat things that make you happy, and give yourself permission to slow down without guilt.

weekly.overview: This week you're in your restoration era, Cancer. The cosmos is giving soft energy—time to tend to what matters most and release what's been weighing on your heart. Trust the quiet moments.
weekly.love: Someone's paying attention to the little things you do. Whether single or coupled, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Let people see the real you, messy and all. Connection deepens when masks come off.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. Don't sleep on that creative solution brewing in your mind—share it when you feel ready. Small wins compound. Focus on progress over perfection and watch momentum build.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Move in ways that feel good, not obligatory. Rest isn't laziness—it's part of your power-up sequence. Hydrate, journal, do whatever helps you feel grounded and present.
